def negative_base_class_exists_only_to_share_data_fields_not_behavior():
    rule_id = "base_class_exists_only_to_share_data_fields_not_behavior"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag base classes that provide only data containers with no meaningful shared behavior."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
